---
title: "Workshop 01 - Introduction to ARBO-WATCH"
date: 2024-03-01
facilitator: "Jane Doe"
categories: [introduction, arboreal-monitoring]
description: "An introduction to the ARBO-WATCH project, its goals, and the monitoring framework."
---

## About This Workshop

This workshop introduces participants to the ARBO-WATCH project — its goals, structure, and the monitoring framework that underpins the 4-year programme. By the end of this workshop, participants will understand the field and data workflows used throughout the series.

---

## Prerequisites

Before attending, please ensure you have:

- Installed [R](https://cran.r-project.org/) (version ≥ 4.2) and [RStudio](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/)
- Installed the `tidyverse` package: `install.packages("tidyverse")`
- Read the project background document (see Materials below)
- Brought a laptop with at least 4 GB of free disk space

---

## Timetable

| Day | Date | Topics | Facilitator |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Day 1](day-01.qmd) | 01 Mar 2024 | Welcome, Project Overview, Intro to Arboreal Monitoring | Jane Doe |
| [Day 2](day-02.qmd) | 02 Mar 2024 | Monitoring Protocols, Deep Dive, Group Discussion | Jane Doe, Maria Lopez |

---

## Materials

### Slides

| Day | Link |
|---|---|
| Day 1 | [View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-primary} |
| Day 2 | [View Slides](slides.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-primary} |

### R Scripts

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [analysis.R](analysis.R) | Workshop 01 R script |

### Reference Documents

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [reference.pdf](reference.pdf) | Background reading for Workshop 01 |
